sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36975" key="e(ca/stulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑξά-στῡλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n36975.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with six columns in front,</tr_> of temples, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
